title: CandidateListing
description: FROZEN CONTRACT. A discovered listing BEFORE any call is placed. Produced by discovery (Places/portal search) and geofenced by radius/commute BEFORE dispatch. The web app lets the user deselect candidates; the orchestrator dials the selected ones and each produces one Quote keyed by the same listing_id. Do not rename fields without telling the whole team.

listing_id.description: Stable unique id; the resulting Quote reuses this exact id.

phone.description: Contact number to dial. May be absent until enriched.

lat.description: Listing latitude (for the map + commute filter).

distance_km.description: Straight-line/road distance from the requirement's target area.

commute_minutes.description: Estimated one-way commute to the requirement's reference point (Distance Matrix).

advertised_rent.description: Portal-advertised monthly rent, if any. Advisory only; the real number comes from the call's Quote.

listing_url.description: Link to the source listing, if any.
